title: Zelda CDi Reanimated Collab (Scene 002) - Making of
description:
Me and my friend AbsoL-G took part in the Zelda CDi Reanimated Collab orgazied by PatchToons, here's one the 2 clips we worked on.

I felt truly honored that I got to work on the legendary "Mah boi" scene.
